block_01: Learn about the pros and cons of trading and investing to choose the best approach for you.
block_02: Some people prefer trading because it may involve shorter timeframes and lower investments. Others choose investing as they don’t want to spend much time checking their deals and looking for short-term trend reversals.
block_03: Both methods have their pros and cons, so you can pick the one that best fits your lifestyle and financial goals. Keep reading to learn about the benefits and potential risks of trading and investing to make your choice.
block_07: How can I choose the right settings for technical indicators?
block_10: There are different types of technical indicators that you may use for trading. They usually have default settings, which could be enough for most trading methods. However, sometimes you can adjust the settings to enhance the indicator’s performance.
